agentMessage.excerpt:
Review checklist → needsFix
✓  Build completed — the implementor finished in 29 round(s)
✓  Change is visible — 1 file(s) changed: internal/engine/scorer_test.go
✓  Changed the deliverable's target files — expected ≥1 of: internal/engine/scorer_test.go
✓  Verification passed — the project verify command was GREEN
✓  Work committed — committed locally on the build branch
0.30  Implements the approved plan — Only 2 of 5 plan-required tests have non-skipped implementations (Test #5 is t.Skip, Tests #3 and #4 delivered in s0, #1 and #2 in s1). Even the 4 non-skipped tests have gaps: TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric as plan mandates; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks omits grade (A/B/C/D/F) assertion; TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability != 0.95.
1.00  Minimal and scoped — Only scorer_test.go was modified, matching the plan's single target file; no production code, language_tiers.go, or other files were touched.
0.25  No test-gaming / faking — TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric to avoid triggering the unsupported path where 0.5 defaults could reappear — this weakens the guard. TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade/Unsupported assertions the plan explicitly required. TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd (honest but unimplemented). TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored passes via TierGeneric nil-return without proving maintainability != 0.95.
0.35  Safe to advance — No security risk, but the DefaultsNotInjected test using 'go' instead of TierGeneric means the old-0.5-default-injection guard for unsupported languages is not actually tested, leaving a regression gap. SupportedLanguage_StillWorks lacks a grade assertion, reducing its value as a regression guard. Advancing would ship under-tested coverage.
0.92  Judge confidence — at or above the confidence bar

Reviewer independently re-ran the project verification (go build -o build/bin/certify ./cmd/certify/ && go test ./... -count=1): GREEN

Reviewer:
- Only 2 of 5 plan-required test functions have non-skipped implementations (AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip, the other 4 have gaps)
- TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions per plan
- TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported language) instead of TierGeneric as the plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard
- TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks omits grade (A/B/C/D/F) assertion required by plan
- TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability != 0.95
- aggregate score 0.475 below threshold 0.600
